interpretation.title: Barrage V2 · four-model release run
interpretation.releaseMeaning: A failed release gate means the model missed at least one strict requirement; it does not mean the run crashed.
interpretation.finding: All four models completed performance, cache, tool, concurrency, and vision checks. Sandbox acceptance prevented release qualification for every candidate.
interpretation.separation: Performance, tools, sandbox, concurrency, vision, and bespoke agent-harness evaluations are separate evidence families. No composite score is calculated.

models.name: Qwen 3.6 35B A3B
notes: One malformed tool call was retained as an HTTP 500 in the run evidence.
